About Our Clinic

Varanasi's Premier Orthodontic Destination

Apex Dental Care & Orthodontic Centre is led by Dr. Rajat Srivastava — BDS, MDS (Orthodontist) and Gold Medalist — with over a decade of specialized expertise in transforming smiles across Varanasi and Uttar Pradesh.

Located on Shivpur Bypass Road, near the Petrol Pump in Laxmanpur, Varanasi, our clinic combines state-of-the-art dental technology with a compassionate, patient-first approach that makes every visit comfortable.

We offer comprehensive dental care — from simple cleaning to complex orthodontic corrections — with strict hygiene protocols, modern sterilization, and honest, transparent pricing.

Braces & Clear AlignersMetal, ceramic & invisible
Painless RCTRotary endodontic system
Digital X-RayRVG & modern imaging
Autoclave Sterilized100% safe & hygienic
Dental ImplantsTitanium, permanent fix
₹100 ConsultationNo hidden charges
Dr. Rajat Srivastava
BDS, MDS (Orthodontics)
Specialist in Braces · Clear Aligners · Implants

Our Services

Complete Dental Care
Under One Roof

From orthodontic correction to cosmetic smile design — every treatment with precision and care.

Get Quote
Most Popular

Braces & Clear Aligners

Metal braces, ceramic braces, and invisible clear aligners — customized for your teeth alignment and bite correction with expert supervision.

Book Now

Root Canal Treatment

Painless RCT using advanced rotary endodontic systems. Save your infected tooth without pain, with comfortable single-visit options available.

Book Now

Dental Implants

Permanent titanium implants that look, feel, and function like natural teeth — restoring your confidence and oral health for life.

Book Now

Teeth Cleaning & Scaling

Professional prophylaxis, ultrasonic scaling, and polishing to remove tartar, plaque, and stains for a fresh and healthy smile.

Book Now

Cosmetic Dentistry

Veneers, bonding, whitening, smile makeovers — designed to enhance your natural beauty with precise aesthetic dental artistry.

Book Now

Crown, Cap & Capping

CAD/CAM ceramic and PFM crowns crafted for precise fit and natural appearance — durable protection for damaged or treated teeth.

Book Now

Why Choose Us

The Apex Difference

We combine specialist expertise, cutting-edge technology, and genuine care — making every dental visit a positive experience.

MDS Gold Medalist Orthodontist

Dr. Rajat Srivastava holds BDS & MDS in Orthodontics and is a gold medalist — bringing the highest academic credentials to every treatment at our clinic.

State-of-the-Art Equipment

Digital RVG X-ray, CAD/CAM crown technology, rotary RCT systems, and motorized dental chair — equipped with the latest dental technology for precise results.

Completely Painless Treatments

Advanced local anesthesia, rotary instruments, and gentle technique ensure that even complex procedures like RCT and extractions are completely pain-free.

Zero-Compromise Sterilization

Autoclave sterilization for all instruments, single-use disposables, and strict infection-control protocols — your safety is our first priority.

Transparent & Affordable Pricing

Consultations at just ₹100. All treatment costs are clearly communicated upfront — no hidden charges, no unnecessary upselling, ever.

Care for All Ages

From children's first dental visit to senior dental rehabilitation — our team is trained to make every patient, at every age, feel comfortable and cared for.
